/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/test_package_msgs/libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/test_package_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/test_package_msgs/msg/_aruco_marker_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/minibot/test_files_ros/build/test_package_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
